channel.title: Za Ndani
channel.description: Kenya and World News, Politics, Sports, and Entertainment

item.title: A Loom of Fortune: Investing Women Blue Economy Kenya
item.dc:creator: The Chronicler
item.description: A tale woven from distant shores, where self-reliance forged empires, and the counsel for financial independence echoes, challenging the very loom of destiny fo

item.title: How Finance Bill 2026 Changes Kenya Tax Filing Deadline to April
item.dc:creator: Celestine Nzioka
item.description: Treasury CS John Mbadi proposes moving the Kenya tax filing deadline to April 30 starting 2027 to shorten the window for taxpayers. Get the details.
item.content:encoded: Treasury CS John Mbadi proposes moving the Kenya tax filing deadline to April 30 starting 2027 to shorten the window for taxpayers. Get the details.

item.content:encoded: President Ruto faces criticism as Talanta Sports City's progress highlights unfulfilled development pledges and poor service delivery in the Rift Valley.

item.title: Finance Bill 2026: How KRA Will Override Current Tax Deals

item.title: Security vulnerability in cPanel and WHM allows unauthorized administrative access without passwords
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Muthoni
